meta.upcomingUpdate: Sea 2 — expected April 18-19, 2026 (4 new islands, Guilds, Bloodlines, World Bosses)

S+.name: Dragon Fruit
S+.description: Most versatile fruit — flight + massive damage. Best all-rounder in the game as of March 2026.

S+.name: Fiend Fruit
S+.description: Best life-steal damage fruit. Excellent for both PvP and PvE sustainability.

S+.name: Kitsune Fruit
S+.description: Best farming fruit — Lucky Multiplier is unmatched for rare drops and grinding.

S.name: Light Fruit
S.description: Best Legendary fruit — serious damage output + flight for fast map traversal. Top-tier for PvE and PvP.

S.name: Quake Fruit
S.description: Strong AoE damage, great for boss fights and mob grinding. Raw power near the top despite no mobility.

A.name: Flame Fruit
A.description: Solid early and mid-game fruit with reliable AoE. Doesn't scale as well into the late game.

B.name: Bomb Fruit
B.description: Decent burst damage but lacks skill variety. Falls behind stronger fruits.

D.name: Invisible Fruit
D.description: Stealth utility but almost no combat value. Avoid if damage is your priority.

S+.name: Ice Queen
S+.description: Best AoE and burst damage with low cooldowns. Added in the Ice Update (April 8, 2026).
S+.requirements: Frost Empress Title + Ice Queen materials

S+.name: Atomic
S+.description: Highest raw damage in the game. Extremely difficult to obtain but worth every step.
S+.requirements: Shadow Sword + Eminence Incarnate Title + Atomic materials

S+.name: Shadow Monarch
S+.description: Highest overall damage of all swords. Excellent burst with V and F skills. Not ideal for AFK farming.
S+.requirements: King of Shadows Title + Jinwoo Sword + Monarch materials

S.name: Abyssal Empress
S.description: Great late-game sword, relatively easy to obtain via Infinite Tower farming.

S.name: True Aizen
S.description: Extremely high damage, amazing AoE on all skills, fast animations. Best for farming bosses and dungeons.
S.requirements: Aizen Sword + Transcendent Being Title + True Aizen materials

S.name: Yamato
S.description: Very long M1 range, excellent AoE, fast animations and short cooldowns. Hardest acquisition in the game.
S.requirements: Blade Sovereign Title + Swordblessed Race + Yamato materials

S.name: Escanor
S.description: Massive AoE damage and strong overall DPS. No Mastery questline. Drops from Boss Rush.

S.name: Rimuru
S.description: Great AoE and cooldowns, X skill excellent for AFK farming. Long animations are the only downside.
S.requirements: Demon Lord Title + 20,000 Gems + Slime materials

S.name: Shadow
S.description: Very good M1 damage, fast animations, excellent for PvE grinding. Extremely long Mastery questline.
S.requirements: 1 Atomic Core + Shadow Essence + Void Seeds

A.name: Ichigo
A.description: Best mid-game sword — very good AoE and damage, fast animations with many iFrames. No F move.

A.name: Aizen
A.description: Relatively fast animations, good damage and AoE, iFrames on several moves. Weak without Mastery.

A.name: Ragna
A.description: Decent damage and AoE, better than Jinwoo overall. Currently unobtainable.

B.name: Jinwoo
B.description: Good mid-game sword with decent AoE. Lowest DPS of all Mythical Swords.

B.name: Saber
B.description: Easy to obtain and useful early. Much weaker than mythic swords.
B.requirements: 65 Boss Tickets or Saber Boss (2% drop)

C.name: Gryphon
C.description: Decent early-game sword. Good option until late game.

C.name: Dark Blade
C.description: Better than most fruits early on. X move good for early mob grinding.

C.name: Katana
C.description: Very basic early game starter weapon. Quickly replaced.

S+.name: Moon Slayer
S+.description: Strong damage and short cooldowns. Top melee spec with the Six Eyed Demon title requirement.
S+.requirements: Moon Slayer materials + Six Eyed Demon Title

S+.name: Strongest Shinobi
S+.description: Strongest damage stats in the game. Long cooldowns are the only weakness.
S+.requirements: Strongest Shinobi materials + Battlefield Warlord Title

S.name: Anos
S.description: Extremely high burst damage with V and F skills. Very large AoE. No Mastery questline.
S.requirements: Demon King Title + Voldigoat Clan + Calamity materials

S.name: Corrupted Excalibur
S.description: Massive F move damage and knockback. Very good for PvP combos.
S.requirements: Corrupt Tyrant Title + 35,000 Gems + Corruption materials

S.name: Gilgamesh
S.description: Fast animations and strong DPS. V and F have many iFrames. AoE is narrow on some skills.

S.name: Strongest in History
S.description: Highest M1 damage of all melee specs. All skills deal multi-hit damage. Difficult to obtain.
S.requirements: Disgraced One Title + Cursed Flesh + Malevolent Soul

A.name: Strongest of Today
A.description: Huge AoE on all skills, many iFrames. Amazing for dungeon grinding. Lower M1 damage.
A.requirements: Strongest Sorcerer Title + Infinity Essence + Six Eyes

A.name: Madoka
A.description: Strong burst and AoE. Excellent for boss fights. No Mastery questline.
A.requirements: Star Maiden Title + 20,000,000 Cash + 15,000 Gems + Pink Gem

A.name: Alucard
A.description: Good mid-game spec with fast animations and low cooldowns. Requires Vampire race.
A.requirements: Vampire King Title + Vampire Race + 6,500,000 Cash

A.name: Qin Shi
A.description: Very easy to obtain. Great early option with short cooldowns. Falls off hard later.

B.name: Sukuna
B.description: Strong early damage with decent AoE. Fast animations. Useless in late game.

B.name: Gojo
B.description: Good skill damage, easy to obtain. Long animations and worst Mythical melee spec.

B.name: Yuji
B.description: Better damage than Katana Sword early on. Decent AoE but very short M1 range.
B.requirements: Divergent Pulse + Flash Impact + Energy Core

C.name: Combat
C.description: Default starter spec. Only useful until you can buy Katana Sword.

S+.name: Luckborn
S+.description: Best luck stat bonus of all races. Improves both melee and sword damage. Added in Ice Update.

S+.name: SwordBlessed
S+.description: Best race for sword builds. +20% Sword DMG Multiplier is the highest of any race.

S+.name: Galevorn
S+.description: Best race for melee builds. +20% Melee DMG Multiplier dominates melee-focused content.

S.name: Warlord
S.description: Massive HP, damage boosts, and the best damage multiplier in the game. Low lifesteal.

S.name: Sunborn
S.description: Massive HP boosts, sword DMG multipliers, and lifesteal. Best all-round race for survivability + DPS.

S.name: Servant
S.description: Perfect for melee builds. Strong melee multiplier + high HP + lifesteal + damage reduction.

S.name: Kitsune
S.description: Strong damage bonuses and powerful luck multiplier. Best race for grinding rare drops.

A.name: Slime
A.description: Excellent survivability and sword scaling. Best race for sword-focused builds outside S+.

A.name: Leviathan
A.description: High lifesteal and solid damage bonuses. Strong for long boss fights.

A.name: Oni
A.description: Focuses on melee damage and durability. Works very well with melee specs.

A.name: Hollow
A.description: Strong bonuses for Ichigo builds. Value decreases with other weapons.

A.name: Shinigami
A.description: Significantly boosts Aizen builds. Solid HP and damage stats universally.

B.name: Shadowborn
B.description: Powerful when paired with Shadow swords. More average without that synergy.

B.name: Player
B.description: Balanced stats, boosts Jinwoo swords. Usefulness depends on weapon.

B.name: Vessel
B.description: Works best with Sukuna builds. Average outside that synergy.

B.name: Limitless
B.description: Boosts Gojo melee abilities. Lacks strong general bonuses.

B.name: Vampire
B.description: Provides lifesteal and decent damage. Overall stat values lower than higher tier races.

C.name: Demon
C.description: Sprint speed and basic damage bonuses. Useful early, quickly outclassed.

C.name: Orc
C.description: Minor HP and damage increases. Useful in early game only.

C.name: Fishman
C.description: Increases money and EXP gain. Useful for leveling, no combat value.

C.name: Mink
C.description: Improves movement stats (jump height, speed). Zero damage bonuses.

D.name: Skypea
D.description: Only grants extra jumps. Almost no combat advantage.

D.name: Human
D.description: No stat bonuses at all. Reroll as soon as possible.

S+.name: Emperor
S+.description: Best damage boost trait in the game. Best cooldown reduction. Mandatory for top builds.

S+.name: Swordblessed
S+.description: Best trait for sword builds — pairs with Warlord or Kitsune race for the ultimate sword meta.

S.name: Celestial
S.description: Extremely high damage scaling + strong defense bonuses. Cooldown reduction makes abilities available more often.

S.name: Singularity
S.description: High damage multipliers and excellent defensive scaling. One of the most balanced powerful traits.

S.name: Cataclysm
S.description: Heavy damage output with strong defensive bonuses. Works well with nearly every build.

S.name: Overlord
S.description: Massive defense scaling and high damage bonuses. Very strong in difficult boss fights and late game.

S.name: Malevolent
S.description: Excellent damage multipliers and cooldown reduction. Slightly weaker than top traits but still dominant.

A.name: Transcendent
A.description: Strong damage and defense bonuses. Performs well but doesn't reach S tier power.

A.name: Infinity
A.description: Solid multipliers and cooldown reduction. Great for builds relying on frequent skill usage.

A.name: Godspeed
A.description: Focuses on cooldown reduction over damage. More abilities more often.

A.name: Sovereign
A.description: Very strong defensive scaling. Damage bonus is lower compared to other A-tier traits.

A.name: Genesis
A.description: Balanced stats without any standout bonuses. Solid all-rounder.

B.name: Dominator
B.description: Decent damage and defense boosts. Works well early, weaker later.

B.name: Unstoppable
B.description: Strong defense but weaker damage scaling.

B.name: Overdrive
B.description: Moderate bonuses and small cooldown reduction.

B.name: Ascended
B.description: Balanced damage and defense but nothing exceptional.

C.name: Breaker
C.description: Mainly defense, lacks strong offensive bonuses.

C.name: Sharpened
C.description: Minor damage increase, almost no defensive value.

C.name: Vicious
C.description: Minor stat boosts and small cooldown reduction.

C.name: Predator
C.description: Minor damage increase, weak defensive scaling.

C.name: Driven
C.description: Small bonuses that quickly become outdated.

D.name: Balanced
D.description: Small damage and defense bonuses easily replaced.

D.name: Steady
D.description: Weak defensive scaling, limited offensive value.

D.name: Agile
D.description: Minor cooldown reduction only, no other useful bonuses.

D.name: Tough
D.description: Minor defense increase, does not improve damage.

S+.name: Primordial Rune
S+.description: Secret rune — best DPS rune in the entire game. Extremely rare to obtain.

S+.name: Radiant Rune
S+.description: Best rune for farming — improves both luck and drop rates significantly.

S.name: Havoc Rune
S.description: Best DPS rune with a 82% damage boost. Excellent for solo clearing bosses and endgame grinding.

S.name: Wrath Rune
S.description: Second highest damage boost in the game. Best option if you don't have Havoc Rune.

S.name: Fortune Rune
S.description: Increases luck — improves chance of rare drops. Extremely valuable for farming bosses and items.

A.name: Destruction Rune
A.description: Strong damage boost, but not as high as Havoc or Wrath. Solid alternative.

B.name: Inferno Rune
B.description: Applies burn DoT to enemies. Useful in longer fights but weaker than direct damage boosts.

B.name: Blood Rune
B.description: Causes enemies to bleed for extra damage over time. Decent effect, not top-tier.

C.name: Frost Rune
C.description: Briefly freezes enemies and increases damage slightly. Situational and unreliable.

C.name: Guardian Rune
C.description: Increases maximum HP for survivability. Does not boost damage — limited usefulness.

C.name: Suppression Rune
C.description: Provides minor damage reduction. Very minor effect compared to other rune bonuses.

S+.name: Frostbane
S+.description: Passive stacks damage for late-game boss slaying. Additional luck for more drops. Added in Ice Update.

S+.name: Upper
S+.description: One of the strongest stat-boosting clans. Passive deals more damage after every skill used.
S+.bonuses: +40% DMG, +50% Max HP, +12% Melee DMG, +12% Luck

S+.name: Alter
S+.description: Huge damage and HP boosts. Passive constantly deals damage for using abilities. Best for long boss fights.

S+.name: Espada
S+.description: Balanced stats with similar passive mechanic to Alter. Excellent for boss fights and long battles.

S.name: Pride
S.description: Huge damage and HP boosts with a stacking damage mechanic. One of the strongest for boss fights.

S.name: Monarch
S.description: Strong damage bonuses and chance to gain extra drops. Best clan for farming rare materials.

S.name: Voldigoat
S.description: Increases damage against low HP enemies. Extremely powerful for finishing bosses quickly.

A.name: Mugetsu
A.description: Balanced bonuses including damage, HP, lifesteal, and damage reduction. Works for most builds.

A.name: Yamato
A.description: Solid damage and HP bonuses while increasing gem gains. Useful for farming resources.

A.name: Zoldyck
A.description: Improves sprint speed and gem gain while offering decent damage bonuses.

B.name: Raikage
B.description: Moderate stat boosts with money and gem bonuses. Helpful early, weaker for end-game combat.

C.name: Sasaki
C.description: Small damage and XP bonuses. Lacks strong scaling compared to other clans.

S+.name: Abyssal Crown Set
S+.description: Best DPS bonuses and crit stats in the game. Hard to farm higher rarity pieces.

S.name: Celestial Rupture Set
S.description: Best DPS bonuses paired with lifesteal. Hard to farm but top-tier performance.

A.name: Void Reaver Set
A.description: Good early-to-mid game damage bonuses. Slightly weaker in late game.

B.name: Black Horizon Set
B.description: Strong critical damage scaling. Lower base stats than higher tiers.

C.name: Crownless Regalia Set
C.description: Good defensive bonuses. Lower damage output — more suitable for tanky builds.

C.name: Ashen Chronicles Set
C.description: Balanced defensive bonuses. Weak damage scaling overall.

synergies.name: Emperor Meta (PvP)
synergies.description: The dominant PvP meta — Light speed + Yamato range + Emperor cooldowns + SwordBlessed DMG multi

synergies.name: Farming King
synergies.description: Maximum drop rate farming build — Kitsune luck + Fortune Rune + Monarch drop bonus

synergies.name: Boss Destroyer
synergies.description: Top-tier boss burst — Dragon versatility + Shadow Monarch damage + Frostbane stacking + Celestial scaling

synergies.name: Ice Queen Bruiser
synergies.description: New Ice Update meta — Ice Queen AoE + Emperor cooldowns + Havoc 82% damage boost

synergies.name: Melee Berserker
synergies.description: Pure melee DPS — Moon Slayer top spec + Warlord DMG multi + Cataclysm damage + Upper stacking passive

synergies.name: Lucky Grinder
synergies.description: Maximize rare drop chances — best farming setup in the game

upcomingContent.Sea 2: 4 new islands, Guilds, Bloodlines, World Bosses, Sea Beasts
upcomingContent.NewSpecs: Frieren, Castorice, Cosmic Garou, DIO — coming with Sea 2
upcomingContent.JoJoIsland: Part 5 / Golden Wind Roman theme — confirmed for Sea 2

gameMeta.fruitSpawnRate: Every 60 minutes under trees, despawn after 20 minutes
gameMeta.dungeons: Dungeon keys required — collect Puzzle Pieces to unlock

Elemental.label: Elemental (Logia)
Elemental.description: Transform your body into a natural element. Grants immunity to physical attacks at low Haki mastery. These fruits are some of the most common top-tier choices.
Elemental.wikiNote: Logia fruits provide Logia immunity — enemies without Armament Haki cannot damage you.

Natural.label: Natural (Paramecia)
Natural.description: Special body modifications or unique environmental powers. No elemental immunity but highest raw damage potential. Quake and Fiend are the top Natural fruits.
Natural.wikiNote: Natural fruits have the highest raw damage — Quake is the best AFK farming fruit in the game.

Beast.label: Beast (Zoan)
Beast.description: Transform into a powerful creature or beast. Grants a large bonus to HP, access to beast-form abilities, and often flight. Dragon and Kitsune are the current Beast fruits.
Beast.wikiNote: Zoan fruits grant HP bonuses and beast-form moves. Dragon can fly; Kitsune provides a Luck multiplier.

Mythical.label: Mythical (Ancient Zoan)
Mythical.description: The rarest and most powerful transformation fruits in the game. Based on mythological creatures with unique overpowered abilities unavailable to other fruit types.
Mythical.wikiNote: Mythical Zoans are the rarest obtainable fruits — often unlocked through special events or endgame content.
